name: Kirschtaria Wodime - An interesting person
description:
Kirschtaria is summoned as a Caster-class Servant. He has memories of Chaldea and the Crypters, but thanks to his transient nature as a Servant, he seems less distant now.

If anything, he seems interested in you.

Extra art below!

All art from this source.

I wanted to make a lorebook with the Lostbelts lore so that he could properly reference them in this bot, but it's 2 in the morning and I have work tomorrow. I can't. Maybe in my next Kirschtaria bot...?
creator: ZenMode
